hero.sub: Hover over everyday moments and emotions to tint your senses with fragrance

overlay.title: Lingering Note
overlay.sub: Every emotion has blossomed into scent

lines.desc:
When we're sad, when we're happy, when we want to share how we feel — we write.
Even a single diary entry, even one message, is steeped in emotions.
Writing is the most honest record of who we are.

A single familiar scent can revive a forgotten moment.
Scent connects people to people, and for some, it becomes a language that expresses the self more deeply than words.

For centuries, research and attempts to link scent with emotion and sensation have never ceased.
That accumulation grew the fragrance industry, and today people discover identity and narrative in scent.
NewNose completes that connection with data.

lines.text: Emotions become fragrance, preserved in data.
lines.desc:
Yet for a long time, scent has been understood only through intuition.
NewNose builds a precise database connecting emotion and scent by learning from tens of thousands of diary entries, public data, and the chemical properties of aroma molecules.

lines.text: Data becomes a vast map of scent.
lines.desc:
The ability to analyze what was once abstract scent through quantitative data — that itself is innovation.
NewNose's scent map starts from personal diaries and grows into an infrastructure applicable to anyone, in any situation.

howItWorks.title: From daily emotions to your signature scent

steps.title: Write your diary
steps.desc:
Freely record what happened today and how you felt.
You can add emotion tags to capture the mood of the day.

steps.title: AI analyzes your emotions
steps.desc: From a month of diary entries, the AI extracts emotion, sensory, and descriptive keywords and identifies patterns.

steps.title: Your scent recipe is created
steps.desc: Extracted keywords are matched against a database of 50 scent accords to compose your own recipe of top, middle, and base notes.

steps.title: Archived as a scent report
steps.desc:
That month's fragrance is completed and saved to your archive.
Twelve perfume bottles, filled one by one.

part1.heading:
Everyone has their own
signature scent of life
part1.body:
We discovered fragrance in someone's diary.
Memories bloom into scent, and emotions linger as smell.
So why have we only ever focused on sight and sound?
Smell is the most primal and most personal sense.
NewNose gives that sense a language for the very first time.
part1.accent: "Everyone deserves a scent of their own."

editorialCards.title: Emotional Mapping
editorialCards.desc: Your emotional curves, translated into scent notes.

editorialCards.title: Memory Synthesis
editorialCards.desc: Forgotten fragments of memory, woven back together through fragrance.

editorialCards.title: Personal Signature
editorialCards.desc: A unique scent that best expresses who you are.

part2.heading:
When scent becomes data,
the world changes

visions.title: Hyper-personalized scent service
visions.desc:
The more emotional data you build, the more refined your scent recipe becomes.
A fragrance that is yours alone.

visions.title: Psychotherapy & spatial design
visions.desc: A new methodology for designing spaces and experiences through emotion-scent mapping data.

visions.title: A foundational sense for physical AI
visions.desc:
When digital AI understands smell, the world changes entirely.
NewNose is building that language.

part2.footerPrefix: NewNose is not just an app.
part2.footerStrong: It is the first data infrastructure for the language of scent.

appCta.sub: Start now, and in one month you'll receive your very first personal scent recipe.
